title: Health and lifestyle
explanation:
Health and lifestyle

  • health words: symptoms, treatment, recovery, balanced diet, stress
  • verbs: recover, improve, avoid, stretch
  • phrases: get enough sleep, stay hydrated

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: A doctor looked at my ____ and said it was probably flu. | *symptoms | contract | headline
Walking every day can ____ your mood. | *improve | delay | broadcast
She needs more time for ____ after the operation. | *recovery | privacy | training
A ____ includes fruit, vegetables and protein. | *balanced diet | screen time | deadline

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Too much ____ at work can make you tired and irritable. | stress
The doctor recommended a new ____ for his back pain. | treatment
You should ____ before running to protect your muscles. | stretch
Try to ____ sugary drinks if you want more energy. | avoid
Athletes need to ____ during hot weather. | stay hydrated

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: It took her a month to fully ____ from the virus. | *recover | improve | avoid
You should try to get ____ sleep every night. | *enough | balanced | hydrated
This exercise has become a healthy ____. | *habit | symptom | treatment
Citrus fruit contains a lot of vitamin ____.  | *C | D | B12
questions.feedback: Vitamin C is common in citrus fruit.
